title: First battle of Suurja

{{Quote|This shows that the cordon that Captain [Saul] Karath has thrown up is holding. It's only a matter of time before we begin pushing in the other direction.|Catronus Steffans, regarding this and other battles on Suurja|<ref name="taris" />}}
In the early [[Standard day/Legends|days]] of the [[Mandalorian Wars]], a '''battle''' occurred between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] over the [[Agriworld/Legends|agrarian]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Suurja]]. The clash took place in [[3964 BBY]], as [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Saul Karath]] attempted to halt the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] advance at the [[Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line]]. That particular skirmish was inconclusive and led to [[Second battle of Suurja|several]] [[Third battle of Suurja|more]] [[Fourth battle of Suurja|battles]] at Suurja in the coming [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]].

==Prelude==
By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3964 BBY]],<ref name="taris" /> the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was embroiled in the [[Mandalorian Wars]], a [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-spanning conflict in which the Republic attempted to fend off invading [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|legions]] from the fringes of known [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. The Mandalorian warrior clans besieged and conquered many [[Star system/Legends|systems]] on the edges of Republic control, starting in the far-flung reaches of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].<ref name="nec">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> By 3964 BBY, the Mandalorians were steadily moving toward the [[Core Worlds/Legends|center]] of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], leading [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Saul Karath]] to throw up a defensive cordon known as the [[Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line]]. Heavy fighting occurred along that barrier, although the Mandalorians were not able to break through. One of the [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] in the line of fire was [[Suurja]], an [[Agriworld/Legends|agrarian]] planet with a population of 16 million colonists. About four [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the Mandalorians' [[Battle of Flashpoint Station|capture]] of the Republic [[Flashpoint Stellar Research Station]], the invaders set their sights on Suurja.<ref name="taris" />

==The battle==
The Mandalorians soon did battle with the Republic [[Navy/Legends|naval]] forces, [[Commander/Legends|commanded]] by Saul Karath, for Suurja. However, neither side was able to obtain a conclusive advantage.<ref name="taris" />

==Aftermath==
Although the battle was inconclusive, both sides were still ready to fight. Over the next few [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]], the Republic and the Mandalorians engaged in [[Second battle of Suurja|several]] [[Third battle of Suurja|more]] [[Fourth battle of Suurja|battles]] at Suurja. This and the other battles of Suurja were reported upon in an [[The Taris Holofeed: Prime Edition|edition]] of the [[Taris Holofeed]] news report from the nearby world [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. In the release, Republic defense official [[Catronus Steffans]] was quoted as optimistically saying that the stalemate at Suurja represented a success of Karath's defensive cordon, and that it heralded an upcoming Republic pushback.<ref name="taris" />

==Behind the scenes==
The battle of Suurja garnered its first, and thus far only, mention in ''[[The Taris Holofeed: Prime Edition]]'', a short postscript to the [[2006]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] [[Knights of the Old Republic 0|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 0]]. A short summary of this and other battles at Suurja is given, written by [[John Jackson Miller]], in the style of an [[in-universe]] news report.<ref name="taris" />
